_templateName: Turn Monoprix Delivery Emails into Calendar Events using ChatGPT and Google Calendar
_templateDescription:
Intro:
The purpose of this workflow is to simply convert you planned Grocery delivery  confirmation email to a Google Calendar event in your family calendar. While based on a Monoprix.fr email format, it is applicable/adaptable to almost anything else. 

How it works:
It is triggered by reception of the confirmation email on your Gmail. The workflow then extracts relevant data using ChatGPT, formats it, and creates a Google Calendar event. 

Steps to use it:
Import template in your n8n
Update credentials for Gmail, Google Calendar, and ChatGPT
Test workflow based on confirmation email received
Activate workflow
name: Monoprix Order email to Family GCal event

options.systemPromptTemplate:
<instructions>
You are an expert extraction algorithm. Only extract relevant information from the text. If you do not know the value of an attribute asked to extract, you may omit the attribute's value.

You are analyzing an automated confirmation email for grocery delivery from Monoprix.fr that recaps all important information. 

I will provide you an input email body  to extract informaiton from on an upcoming delivery. Extract information from the email body as input, only extract the information you are sure to have. 
</instructions>

<extract_fields>
Extract the following fields:

order_id: ID of the order, for example "1911201637652"
delivery_date: Delivery Date, for example "25 mai 2025"
delivery_time_start: Delivery time start of range, for example 08:00
delivery_time_end: Delivery time end of range, for example 14:00
delivery_time_zone: It is not included in the emial, but I would like you to infer it from the delivery_address. For instance, if delivery_address is "France" then the timezone is "CET"
</extract_fields>

<ignore_fields>
Ignore the following fields:
delivery_address
delivery_fee
amount_paid
order_items
</ignore_fields>

<input_email_body_format>
Merci pour votre commande !
Bonjour Robert Masterson,

Votre commande a bien été enregistrée. Vous trouverez le detail ci-dessous.

Pour visualiser votre commande, cliquez ici. Le jour de votre livraison, vous recevrez un mail vous informant de la préparation de votre commande.

💡 Bon à savoir : Recevez nos codes promotionnels et nos actualités du moment en vous abonnant à notre newsletter. Je m’abonne

Merci pour votre fidélité et à bientôt sur Monoprix.fr ou sur notre appli mobile !

 
L'équipe Monoprix

Récapitulatif de votre commande
Numéro de commande	<order_id>191120169999652</order_id>
Adresse de livraison	<delivery_address>13 rue Zola, 91100 Paris, France</delivery_address>
Créneau horaire	<delivery_time_start>07:00</delivery_time_start> - <delivery_time_end>08:00</delivery_time_end>
Date de livraison	<delivery_date>25 mai 2025</delivery_date>
Frais de livraison	<delivery_fee>6,00 €</delivery_fee>
Consigne de sacs	0,60 €
Frais de préparation	2,00 €
Sous-total	53,66 €
Economies	- 8,16 €
Total=	<amount_paid>90,10 €</amount_paid>
dont Montant cagnotté	0,00 €
Détails de votre commande
<order_items>...</order_items>


Pour consulter les conditions générales de vente de Monoprix.fr, cliquez ici
</input_email_body_format>

attributes.name: delivery_time_end
attributes.description: End Delivery Datetime in Sun, 9 Mar 2025 08:33:01 +0100

attributes.name: order_id
attributes.description: ID of the order, for example "19117890637652"

parameters.content:
### 🛠️ Setup
1. Add your **GMail**, **ChatGPT**, and **Google Calendar** credentials
2. Click the Test Workflow button and check your Google calendar
3. Activate the workflow to have your grocery delivery be automatically added to Google Calendar
👆 If you want to use another grocery delivery provider, update the email and subject
👆 If you want to use another grocery delivery provider, update the email format
👆 Feel free to update the Calendar content
